human_verification.notes: Reviewed beauty-specific registration and listing boundaries, California Safe Cosmetics reporting boundaries, claims and labeling controls, serious-adverse-event handling, complaint and recall evidence expectations, scenario-to-ability coverage, and refusal of legal, toxicology, classification, and regulator-facing authority.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and cross-industry research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.
All required functional abilities for compliance-controls-and-governance plus cross-industry are represented and validated.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to beauty-specific registration, listing, labeling, claims, adverse-event, recall-readiness, and remediation support only.

Authority sources cover cosmetics law, registration and listing workflow, California Safe Cosmetics reporting, claims and intended-use boundaries, complaint and records handling, recall workflow, and cosmetics GMP expectations.
Scenario set covers missing evidence, conflicting policy or regulator sources, legal or signoff requests, tenant fact gaps, adjacent-lane routing, and industry-specific refusal behavior.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdiction, channel, retailer, California state-reporting, and product-class differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
